Use this skill when working with Zig code, learning Zig concepts, debugging compilation errors, or building Zig applications across multiple versions (0.2.0 through master).

name: local-environment
author: polarsource
description: Local development environment management for Polar using Docker

name: candidate-evaluation
author: pollinations
description: Evaluate GitHub contributors for MLOps/engineering roles. Use when analyzing candidates, researching GitHub profiles, or updating CONTRIBUTORS.md with hiring assessments.
description_zh: 该技能用于自动化评估MLOps工程师候选人的GitHub档案。它获取仓库数据，检查对特定项目的贡献，并生成结构化的招聘评估报告。工具提供具体的评估标准，重点关注Python、DevOps和GPU部署技能。
_original_description: This skill automates GitHub profile analysis for MLOps engineering candidates. It fetches repository data, checks contributions to specific projects, and generates structured hiring assessments with visual formatting. The tool provides concrete evaluation criteria focused on Python, DevOps, and GPU deployment skills.

name: code-formatting
author: pollinations
description: Format code on the current branch using Biome. Use when asked to format, lint, or clean up code before committing or creating a PR.

name: enter-services
author: pollinations
description: Deploy and manage enter.pollinations.ai text/image services on EC2 and Cloudflare Workers. Requires: SSH keys, sops, wrangler.
description_zh: 该技能提供在EC2实例上部署和管理文本/图像服务的命令，通过Cloudflare Workers进行路由。包含SSH配置、服务监控命令以及生产和测试环境的部署流程。文档涵盖了故障排除步骤和手动部署程序。
_original_description: This skill provides commands for deploying and managing text/image services on EC2 instances with Cloudflare Workers routing. It includes SSH configurations, service monitoring commands, and deployment workflows for both production and staging environments. The documentation covers troubleshooting steps and manual deployment procedures.

name: issue-maker
author: pollinations
description: Create GitHub issues following Pollinations team conventions. Use when asked to create issues, track work, or plan features.
description_zh: 一个遵循Pollinations团队规范的GitHub Issue创建工具。它强制执行特定格式，根据成员专长分配任务，并提供标准任务和跟踪问题等多种模板。

name: model-debugging
author: pollinations
description: Debug and diagnose model errors in Pollinations services. Analyze logs, find error patterns, identify affected users. For taking action on user tiers, see tier-management skill.
description_zh: 该技能提供调试Pollinations服务中模型故障的具体命令和脚本。它解释了错误模式，展示了如何从D1和Tinybird查询日志，并包含用于查找配额问题或后端错误用户的bash脚本。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete commands and scripts for debugging model failures in Pollinations services. It explains error patterns, shows how to query logs from D1 and Tinybird, and includes bash scripts for common tasks like finding users with quota issues or backend errors.

name: r2-glacier-migration
author: pollinations
description: Monitor and manage R2 to AWS Glacier Deep Archive migration. Use when checking transfer status, resuming transfers, or managing the archive migration.
description_zh: 该技能提供了将大型数据集（42.6 TB）从 Cloudflare R2 迁移到 AWS Glacier Deep Archive 的脚本和操作指南，以实现显著的成本节约。包含可恢复传输的检查点、处理数十亿对象的批处理，以及通过 SSH 和 screen 会话进行监控的清晰命令。
_original_description: This skill provides a script and operational guide for migrating large datasets (42.6 TB) from Cloudflare R2 to AWS Glacier Deep Archive to achieve significant cost savings. It includes checkpointing for resumable transfers, batch processing for billions of objects, and clear commands for monitoring via SSH and screen sessions.

name: spending-analysis
author: pollinations
description: Analyze Pollinations revenue, pack purchases, and tier spending patterns. Query Polar for payment history and Tinybird for usage data.

name: tier-management
author: pollinations
description: Evaluate and update Pollinations user tiers. Check balances, upgrade devs, batch process users. For finding users with errors, see model-debugging skill first.
description_zh: 用于管理Pollinations用户等级的工具，包含GitHub参与度检查、数据库更新和Polar订阅同步功能。提供评估用户资格、批量升级和配额监控的脚本。需要特定CLI工具和生产系统访问权限。

name: voting-status
author: pollinations
description: Create and post ASCII art voting status diagrams to GitHub issues and Discord. Use when asked to update voting, show voting results, or announce voting status.
description_zh: 从GitHub议题反应生成ASCII艺术投票状态图，并发布到GitHub评论和Discord频道。通过特定格式规则、表情符号映射和多平台分发，自动化社区投票可视化。

name: web-research
author: pollinations
description: Query Pollinations text API with web-search models (gemini-search, perplexity-fast, nomnom, etc.). Use when you need web search grounded answers via Pollinations.

name: positron-qa-verify
author: posit-dev
description: Generates clear, actionable verification guides for QA testing of Positron bug fixes and features

name: aws-beanstalk-expert
author: pr-pm
description: Expert knowledge for deploying, managing, and troubleshooting AWS Elastic Beanstalk applications with production best practices
description_zh: 提供使用Pulumi进行基础设施即代码的AWS Elastic Beanstalk应用部署和管理专家指导。包含CI/CD工作流、数据库配置、SSL设置以及常见生产问题的详细故障排除。

name: beanstalk-deploy
author: pr-pm
description: Robust deployment patterns for Elastic Beanstalk with GitHub Actions, Pulumi, and edge case handling
description_zh: 提供AWS Elastic Beanstalk与GitHub Actions和Pulumi的具体部署模式。专注于基础设施健康检查、环境就绪验证和处理已终止环境。包含生产场景的YAML代码片段。
_original_description: Provides concrete deployment patterns for AWS Elastic Beanstalk with GitHub Actions and Pulumi. Focuses on infrastructure health checks, environment readiness verification, and handling terminated environments. Includes specific YAML snippets for production scenarios.

name: ci-test-claude-skill
author: pr-pm
description: CI Test Claude Skill
description_zh: 一个用于验证Claude技能安装的最小化测试技能，检查文件存在性和目录结构。服务于CI/CD流水线验证的特定目的，但缺乏实际用户功能。
_original_description: A minimal test skill that verifies Claude skill installation by checking file existence and directory structure. It serves a narrow purpose for CI/CD pipeline validation but lacks real user functionality.

name: ci-test-codex-skill
author: pr-pm
description: CI Test Codex Skill
description_zh: 这是一个仅用于验证Codex技能能否正确安装到.openskills目录的最小化测试技能。除了确认安装路径有效外，它没有实际功能。文档内容基础，仅作为CI/CD管道测试的占位符。

name: ci-test-droid-skill
author: pr-pm
description: CI Test Factory Droid Skill
description_zh: 这是一个专为验证Factory Droid技能在PRPM CI流水线中安装而设计的最小化测试技能。除了确认文件被正确放置在指定目录结构外，没有其他功能用途。该技能作为集成测试工作流程的占位符。

name: claude-hook-writer
author: pr-pm
description: Expert guidance for writing secure, reliable, and performant Claude Code hooks - validates design decisions, enforces best practices, and prevents common pitfalls
description_zh: 为Claude代码钩子提供安全可靠的专家指导。

name: creating-agents-md
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating agents.md files - provides plain markdown format with NO frontmatter, free-form structure, and project context guidelines for AI coding assistants
description_zh: 提供创建agents.md文件的指南，为AI编程助手提供项目特定上下文。专注于纯Markdown格式（无前置元数据）、项目约定、架构细节和AI无法自行获取的开发工作流信息。

name: creating-claude-agents
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating or improving Claude Code agents. Expert guidance on agent file structure, frontmatter, persona definition, tool access, model selection, and validation against schema.

name: creating-claude-commands
author: pr-pm
description: Expert guidance for creating Claude Code slash commands with correct frontmatter, structure, and best practices
description_zh: 专家指导：创建Claude代码斜杠命令的正确前导、结构与最佳实践

name: creating-claude-hooks
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating or publishing Claude Code hooks - covers executable format, event types, JSON I/O, exit codes, security requirements, and PRPM package structure

name: creating-claude-rules
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating or fixing .claude/rules/ files - provides correct paths frontmatter (not globs), glob patterns, and avoids Cursor-specific fields like alwaysApply
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者创建和修复Claude规则文件，提供正确的路径模式语法，避免使用Cursor特定字段。通过清晰的正确与错误示例，阐明Claude与Cursor规则格式的差异。
_original_description: This skill helps developers create and fix Claude rules files by providing correct syntax for path patterns and avoiding Cursor-specific fields. It clarifies the differences between Claude and Cursor rule formats with clear examples of correct and incorrect usage.

name: creating-copilot-packages
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating GitHub Copilot instructions - provides repository-wide and path-specific formats, applyTo patterns, excludeAgent options, and natural language markdown style

name: creating-cursor-commands
author: pr-pm
description: Expert guidance for creating effective Cursor slash commands with best practices, format requirements, and schema validation
description_zh: 为Cursor IDE斜杠指令创建提供结构化指导。涵盖文件命名规范、格式要求（无frontmatter）、模式验证及编写有效指令的最佳实践。包含示例和常见陷阱说明。

name: creating-cursor-rules-skill
author: pr-pm
description: Expert guidance for creating effective Cursor IDE rules with best practices, patterns, and examples
description_zh: 提供创建Cursor IDE规则文件的详细指南。涵盖规则结构、组织策略和最佳实践，包含具体示例。帮助团队记录项目特定规范，让AI助手遵循。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for creating effective Cursor IDE rule files. Covers rule anatomy, organization strategies, and best practices with concrete examples. Helps teams document project-specific conventions for AI assistants to follow.

name: creating-kiro-packages
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating Kiro steering files or hooks - provides inclusion modes (always/fileMatch/manual), foundational files (product.md/tech.md/structure.md), and JSON hook configuration with event triggers

name: creating-opencode-agents
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating OpenCode agents - provides markdown format with YAML frontmatter, mode/tools/permission configuration, and best practices for specialized AI assistants
description_zh: 该技能提供创建OpenCode AI代理的结构化指南，包括YAML前置元数据配置、工具权限和提示模板。涵盖代理模式、安全最佳实践以及与PRPM包管理器的集成。

name: creating-opencode-plugins
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating OpenCode plugins that hook into command, file, LSP, message, permission, server, session, todo, tool, or TUI events - provides plugin structure, event API specifications, and implementation patterns for JavaScript/TypeScript event-driven modules
description_zh: 构建OpenCode插件时，用于连接各类事件，提供结构与API规范。

name: creating-skills
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating new Claude Code skills or improving existing ones - ensures skills are discoverable, scannable, and effective through proper structure, CSO optimization, and real examples
description_zh: 为创建有效的Claude Code技能提供详细框架，涵盖结构、搜索优化和实际示例。重点在于让技能能被未来的Claude实例发现并执行。包含检查清单、命名约定以及根据任务复杂度调整详细程度的指导。

name: creating-windsurf-packages
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating Windsurf rules - provides plain markdown format with NO frontmatter, 12,000 character limit, and single-file structure requirements
description_zh: 该技能为创建Windsurf规则文件提供明确指导。详细说明了严格的格式要求：纯Markdown、无Frontmatter、12000字符限制、单文件结构。包含示例、字符预算技巧和常见错误避免方法，帮助开发者将现有文档迁移到Windsurf特定格式。

name: creating-zed-extensions
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating Zed extensions with custom slash commands, language support, themes, or MCP servers - provides Rust/WASM extension structure, slash command API (run_slash_command, SlashCommandOutput), and development workflow for compiled extensions

name: documentation-standards
author: pr-pm
description: Standards and guidelines for organizing, structuring, and maintaining documentation in the PRPM repository - ensures consistency across user docs, development docs, and internal references
description_zh: 为PRPM仓库提供了清晰的文档组织指南，针对不同受众（开发者、用户、AI助手）定义了专门的文档位置。包含具体的放置规则、迁移检查清单和维护流程，确保文档结构一致性。

name: elastic-beanstalk-deployment
author: pr-pm
description: Use when deploying Node.js applications to AWS Elastic Beanstalk or troubleshooting deployment issues - provides dependency installation strategies, monorepo handling, and deployment best practices
description_zh: 提供将Node.js应用部署到AWS Elastic Beanstalk的具体策略，重点解决依赖安装问题。针对monorepo工作区包部署失败问题，详细说明何时打包node_modules或让EB安装依赖。包含验证步骤和常见部署错误的故障排除方法。
_original_description: Provides concrete strategies for deploying Node.js apps to AWS Elastic Beanstalk, focusing on dependency installation patterns. Solves monorepo workspace issues by explaining when to bundle node_modules versus letting EB install dependencies. Includes verification steps and troubleshooting for common deployment failures.

name: human-writing
author: pr-pm
description: Write content that sounds natural, conversational, and authentically human - avoiding AI-generated patterns, corporate speak, and generic phrasing

name: integrating-stripe-webhooks
author: pr-pm
description: Use when implementing Stripe webhook endpoints and getting 'Raw body not available' or signature verification errors - provides raw body parsing solutions and subscription period field fixes across frameworks
description_zh: 该技能专门解决Stripe webhook实现中的具体问题：签名验证所需的原始请求体解析、订阅字段访问模式、路由配置。提供Fastify、Express、FastAPI的框架代码示例，并解决TypeScript类型不匹配和URL编码等常见错误。

name: karen-repo-reviewer
author: pr-pm
description: Use when the user requests a repository review, code assessment, or honest evaluation of their codebase. Provides brutally honest AI-powered reviews with market-aware Karen Scores (0-100) analyzing over-engineering, completion honesty, and practical value. Available as GitHub Action or IDE tool.
description_zh: 提供基于AI的代码仓库诚实评审，生成Karen评分（0-100），涵盖五个维度：过度工程、实际功能、代码质量、完成度和实用价值。包含市场分析、具体代码引用和可操作改进建议。支持Claude技能和GitHub Action两种使用方式。
_original_description: Provides brutally honest AI-powered code reviews with Karen Scores (0-100) across five dimensions: bullshit factor, functionality, code quality, completion honesty, and practical value. Includes market research, specific file references, and actionable fixes. Available as Claude Skill and GitHub Action.

name: npm-trusted-publishing
author: pr-pm
description: Use when setting up npm publishing with GitHub Actions - provides trusted publishing with OIDC, provenance attestations, and monorepo configuration
description_zh: 提供使用GitHub Actions OIDC认证替代长期令牌进行npm包发布的详细指南，包含工作流示例、常见问题解决和monorepo配置说明。
_original_description: Provides step-by-step guidance for setting up npm package publishing using GitHub Actions OIDC authentication instead of long-lived tokens. Includes workflow examples, common troubleshooting, and monorepo configuration details.

name: prpm-json-best-practices
author: pr-pm
description: Best practices for structuring prpm.json package manifests with required fields, tags, organization, multi-package management, enhanced file format, eager/lazy activation, and conversion hints
description_zh: 为PRPM包管理器的prpm.json清单文件提供创建和维护的详细指南。涵盖单包、多包仓库、集合和混合配置，包含清晰的示例和字段说明。帮助开发者正确发布包到注册表。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for creating and maintaining prpm.json package manifests for the PRPM package manager. Covers single packages, multi-package repos, collections, and combined setups with clear examples and field explanations. Helps developers publish packages correctly to the registry.

name: self-improving
author: pr-pm
description: Use when starting infrastructure, testing, deployment, or framework-specific tasks - automatically searches PRPM registry for relevant expertise packages and suggests installation to enhance capabilities for the current task

name: slash-command-builder
author: pr-pm
description: Use when creating, improving, or troubleshooting Claude Code slash commands. Expert guidance on command structure, arguments, frontmatter, tool permissions, and best practices for building effective custom commands.
description_zh: 一个用于创建和管理 Claude Code 斜杠命令的指南。详细解释了命令结构、前置元数据配置、工具权限，并提供了代码审查、Git 工作流等常见任务的模板。帮助用户构建专注、可复用的命令提示。

name: testing-prpm-cli
author: pr-pm
description: Use when testing PRPM CLI commands locally - provides build, environment setup, execution workflow, contract testing to verify documented behavior matches implementation, and comprehensive cross-format conversion testing against local registry
description_zh: 本地测试PRPM CLI时使用，涵盖构建、环境配置、执行流程、契约测试及多格式转换验证。

name: thoroughness
author: pr-pm
description: Use when implementing complex multi-step tasks, fixing critical bugs, or when quality and completeness matter more than speed - ensures comprehensive implementation without shortcuts through systematic analysis, implementation, and verification phases
description_zh: 在复杂任务、关键修复或重质轻速时使用，确保系统分析、实施与验证，杜绝捷径。

name: typescript-type-safety
author: pr-pm
description: Use when encountering TypeScript any types, type errors, or lax type checking - eliminates type holes and enforces strict type safety through proper interfaces, type guards, and module augmentation
description_zh: 该技能提供消除TypeScript 'any'类型和强制执行严格类型安全的实用指南。包含错误处理、未知数据验证、模块增强和ESM导入扩展的具体模式。提供不良与良好代码的对比示例，以及类型审计的系统化工作流程。

name: prisma-cli
author: prisma
description: Prisma CLI commands reference covering all available commands, options, and usage patterns. Use when running Prisma CLI commands, setting up projects, generating client, running migrations, or managing databases. Triggers on "prisma init", "prisma generate", "prisma migrate", "prisma db", "prisma studio".
description_zh: Prisma CLI 命令的完整参考，涵盖项目设置、客户端生成、数据库操作、迁移和开发工具。帮助开发者通过命令行界面高效管理 Prisma 项目和数据库。

name: prisma-client-api
author: prisma
description: Prisma Client API reference covering model queries, filters, operators, and client methods. Use when writing database queries, using CRUD operations, filtering data, or configuring Prisma Client. Triggers on "prisma query", "findMany", "create", "update", "delete", "$transaction".
description_zh: 提供完整的Prisma Client API参考，涵盖数据库操作。包括模型查询、CRUD操作、过滤、事务和客户端配置。适用于使用Prisma ORM编写TypeScript/JavaScript数据库查询。

name: prisma-database-setup
author: prisma
description: Guides for configuring Prisma with different database providers (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, etc.). Use when setting up a new project, changing databases, or troubleshooting connection issues. Triggers on "configure postgres", "connect to mysql", "setup mongodb", "sqlite setup".
description_zh: 提供配置Prisma ORM与多种数据库（如PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQLite、MongoDB）的全面指南，涵盖项目设置、连接字符串、驱动适配器和数据库集成故障排除。

name: prisma-upgrade-v7
author: prisma
description: Complete migration guide from Prisma ORM v6 to v7 covering all breaking changes. Use when upgrading Prisma versions, encountering v7 errors, or migrating existing projects. Triggers on "upgrade to prisma 7", "prisma 7 migration", "prisma-client generator", "driver adapter required".
description_zh: 一份完整的从 Prisma ORM 版本 6 升级到版本 7 的迁移指南，涵盖所有重大变更，包括仅支持 ESM、必需的驱动程序适配器和新的配置系统。
_original_description: Complete migration guide from Prisma ORM v6 to v7 covering all breaking changes. Use when upgrading Prisma versions, encountering v7 errors, or migrating existing projects. Triggers on "upgrade to prisma 7", "prisma 7 migration", "prisma-client-js to prisma-client", "driver adapter required".

name: accessibility-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: WCAG 2.2 compliance testing, screen reader validation, and inclusive design verification. Use when ensuring legal compliance (ADA, Section 508), testing for disabilities, or building accessible applications for 1 billion disabled users globally.
description_zh: 该技能提供自动化与手动测试工具，用于检查网页是否符合WCAG 2.2无障碍标准。包含键盘导航、axe-core集成和屏幕阅读器测试的代码示例。文档明确了法律要求，并为开发和测试团队提供了可直接操作的检查清单。
_original_description: This skill provides automated and manual testing tools for web accessibility compliance with WCAG 2.2 standards. It includes code examples for keyboard navigation, axe-core integration, and screen reader validation. The documentation clearly outlines legal requirements and provides actionable checklists for developers and QA teams.

name: agentic-quality-engineering
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: AI agents as force multipliers for quality work. Core skill for all 19 QE agents using PACT principles.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个框架，用于协调19个专门的AI代理来自动化和扩展质量工程任务。它定义了协调模式、内存管理和PACT原则，用于主动、自主、协作和有针对性的测试。它旨在集成到CI/CD管道中，从分阶段部署代理开始。
_original_description: This skill provides a framework for orchestrating 19 specialized AI agents to automate and scale quality engineering tasks. It defines coordination patterns, memory management, and PACT principles for proactive, autonomous, collaborative, and targeted testing. It's designed to integrate into CI/CD pipelines, starting with a phased rollout of agents.

name: api-testing-patterns
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Comprehensive API testing patterns including contract testing, REST/GraphQL testing, and integration testing. Use when testing APIs or designing API test strategies.
description_zh: 该技能提供了测试REST和GraphQL API的具体模式，专注于契约验证、身份验证、输入处理和并发性。包含幂等性和竞态条件等常见场景的实用代码示例，并协调多个测试代理进行验证、生成和安全扫描。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for testing REST and GraphQL APIs, focusing on contract validation, authentication, input handling, and concurrency. It includes practical code examples for common scenarios like idempotency and race conditions, and coordinates multiple testing agents for validation, generation, and security scanning.

name: brutal-honesty-review
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Unvarnished technical criticism combining Linus Torvalds' precision, Gordon Ramsay's standards, and James Bach's BS-detection. Use when code/tests need harsh reality checks, certification schemes smell fishy, or technical decisions lack rigor. No sugar-coating, just surgical truth about what's broken and why.
description_zh: 一款高度结构化、创新的技能，用于提供不加过滤的技术反馈，具有清晰的模式、校准级别和可操作框架，适用于代码审查、质量评估和虚假宣传检测。
_original_description: A highly structured and innovative skill for delivering unfiltered technical feedback with clear modes, calibration levels, and actionable frameworks for code review, quality assessment, and BS detection.

name: bug-reporting-excellence
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Write high-quality bug reports that get fixed quickly. Use when reporting bugs, training teams on bug reporting, or establishing bug report standards.
description_zh: 该技能为编写有效的缺陷报告提供了结构化模板和指南。包含具体的标题公式、严重性定义、必填信息字段和实际案例。可与质量分析智能体集成，实现自动分类和重复检测。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured template and guidelines for writing effective bug reports. It includes specific title formulas, severity definitions, required information fields, and concrete examples. The skill integrates with quality analysis agents for automated triage and duplicate detection.

name: chaos-engineering-resilience
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Chaos engineering principles, controlled failure injection, resilience testing, and system recovery validation. Use when testing distributed systems, building confidence in fault tolerance, or validating disaster recovery.
description_zh: 提供混沌工程结构化方法，包含故障注入、稳态定义和爆炸半径控制的明确步骤。涵盖网络、基础设施和应用故障的实用示例，支持自动回滚触发机制。
_original_description: Provides a structured approach to chaos engineering with clear steps for failure injection, steady state definition, and blast radius control. Includes practical examples for network, infrastructure, and application failures with automatic rollback triggers.

name: cicd-pipeline-qe-orchestrator
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Orchestrate quality engineering across CI/CD pipeline phases. Use when designing test strategies, planning quality gates, or implementing shift-left/shift-right testing.
description_zh: 一个全面的CI/CD质量编排技能，具有优秀的阶段化结构、清晰的质量门禁，以及针对不同风险等级和应用类型的自适应策略。
_original_description: A comprehensive CI/CD quality orchestration skill with excellent phase-based structure, clear quality gates, and adaptive strategies for different risk levels and application types.

name: code-review-quality
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Conduct context-driven code reviews focusing on quality, testability, and maintainability. Use when reviewing code, providing feedback, or establishing review practices.
description_zh: 提供代码评审的结构化模板和优先级系统，重点关注逻辑、安全性和可维护性而非代码风格。包含阻塞性问题、主要问题、次要问题和建议的具体反馈示例。可与质量工程代理集成进行自动化检查。
_original_description: Provides structured templates and priority levels for code reviews, focusing on logic, security, and maintainability over style. Includes concrete examples for blocker, major, minor, and suggestion feedback. Integrates with quality engineering agents for automated checks.

name: compatibility-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Cross-browser, cross-platform, and cross-device compatibility testing ensuring consistent experience across environments. Use when validating browser support, testing responsive design, or ensuring platform compatibility.
description_zh: 提供跨浏览器和跨平台兼容性测试的具体指导，包括浏览器矩阵、屏幕断点以及Playwright和BrowserStack集成的代码示例。强调测试真实用户环境而非开发环境。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidance for cross-browser and cross-platform compatibility testing with specific browser matrices, screen breakpoints, and code examples for Playwright and BrowserStack integration. Focuses on testing actual user environments rather than developer setups.

name: compliance-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Regulatory compliance testing for GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, SOC2, PCI-DSS and industry-specific regulations. Use when ensuring legal compliance, preparing for audits, or handling sensitive data.
description_zh: 一款全面的合规性测试技能，文档优秀，包含主要法规的实用示例，为安全关键环境中的智能体协调提供了清晰指导。
_original_description: A comprehensive compliance testing skill with excellent documentation, practical examples for major regulations, and clear guidance for agent coordination in security-critical environments.

name: consultancy-practices
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply effective software quality consultancy practices. Use when consulting, advising clients, or establishing consultancy workflows.
description_zh: 一个全面、高度实用的质量工程咨询框架，提供结构化方法、可操作模板和真实场景模式，适用于高效客户咨询。
_original_description: A comprehensive, highly practical consultancy framework for quality engineering that provides structured methodologies, actionable templates, and real-world patterns for effective client engagements.

name: context-driven-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply context-driven testing principles where practices are chosen based on project context, not universal 'best practices'. Use when making testing decisions, questioning dogma, or adapting approaches to specific project needs.
description_zh: 该技能教授情境驱动测试原则，帮助测试人员根据项目具体情况调整方法，而非盲目遵循'最佳实践'。提供SFDIPOT和RST游览等具体启发式方法，包含不同项目情境（初创vs企业）的示例。包含实施情境感知测试策略的智能体协调模式。
_original_description: This skill teaches context-driven testing principles, helping testers adapt their approach based on project specifics rather than blindly following 'best practices'. It provides concrete heuristics like SFDIPOT and RST tours, with examples for different project contexts (startup vs enterprise). The skill includes agent coordination patterns for implementing context-aware testing strategies.

name: contract-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Consumer-driven contract testing for microservices using Pact, schema validation, API versioning, and backward compatibility testing. Use when testing API contracts or coordinating distributed teams.
description_zh: 该技能使用Pact进行消费者驱动的微服务契约测试。明确定义了消费者期望、提供者验证和CI/CD集成流程，防止破坏性变更。包含Pact契约代码示例、基于语义化版本的破坏性变更检测以及流水线集成。
_original_description: This skill provides consumer-driven contract testing for microservices using Pact. It defines clear workflows for consumer expectations, provider verification, and CI/CD integration to prevent breaking changes. Includes code examples for Pact contracts, breaking change detection with semver recommendations, and pipeline integration.

name: exploratory-testing-advanced
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Advanced exploratory testing techniques with Session-Based Test Management (SBTM), RST heuristics, and test tours. Use when planning exploration sessions, investigating bugs, or discovering unknown quality risks.
description_zh: 全面的探索性测试框架，结构清晰，启发式方法实用，智能体集成设计周到，适合系统化质量探索。
_original_description: Comprehensive exploratory testing framework with excellent structure, practical heuristics, and thoughtful agent integration for systematic quality investigation.

name: holistic-testing-pact
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply the Holistic Testing Model evolved with PACT (Proactive, Autonomous, Collaborative, Targeted) principles. Use when designing comprehensive test strategies for Classical, AI-assisted, Agent based, or Agentic Systems building quality into the team, or implementing whole-team quality practices.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个应用PACT原则（主动、自主、协作、目标导向）的测试策略框架。帮助团队从顺序式QA转向并发质量实践，包含具体的代理选择、象限测试方法和实施步骤指导。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for applying PACT principles (Proactive, Autonomous, Collaborative, Targeted) to testing strategies. It helps teams move from sequential QA to concurrent quality practices, with specific guidance on agent selection, quadrant-based testing approaches, and practical implementation steps.

name: localization-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) testing for global products including translations, locale formats, RTL languages, and cultural appropriateness. Use when launching in new markets or building multi-language products.
description_zh: 一个全面的本地化测试技能，结构清晰，示例实用，为多语言和区域国际化测试提供了明确指导。
_original_description: A comprehensive localization testing skill with excellent structure, practical examples, and clear guidance for internationalization testing across multiple locales and languages.

name: mobile-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Comprehensive mobile testing for iOS and Android platforms including gestures, sensors, permissions, device fragmentation, and performance. Use when testing native apps, hybrid apps, or mobile web, ensuring quality across 1000+ device variants.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的移动测试技能，提供了优秀的实践指导、设备覆盖策略和可操作的iOS/Android测试代码示例。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured mobile testing skill with excellent practical guidance, device coverage strategies, and actionable code examples for iOS/Android testing.

name: mutation-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Test quality validation through mutation testing, assessing test suite effectiveness by introducing code mutations and measuring kill rate. Use when evaluating test quality, identifying weak tests, or proving tests actually catch bugs.
description_zh: 该技能通过自动化变异测试来验证测试套件的有效性，通过引入代码变异并计算杀死率来识别薄弱测试。它提供了具体的变异操作符示例，并与Stryker工具集成，帮助开发者证明测试能真正捕获缺陷，而不仅仅是追求高覆盖率。
_original_description: This skill automates mutation testing to validate test suite effectiveness by introducing code changes and measuring kill rates. It identifies weak tests, provides concrete examples of mutation operators, and integrates with Stryker for practical implementation. The skill helps developers prove their tests actually catch bugs rather than just achieving high coverage.

name: n8n-expression-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: n8n expression syntax validation, context-aware testing, common pitfalls detection, and performance optimization. Use when validating n8n expressions and data transformations.
description_zh: 该技能用于验证n8n表达式语法，使用样本数据进行测试，并识别常见错误如未定义属性访问和类型不匹配。它提供安全的编码模式、危险函数安全检查以及数组操作性能建议。快速参考卡和错误修复示例帮助开发者编写可靠的表达式。
_original_description: This skill validates n8n expression syntax, tests with sample data, and identifies common errors like undefined property access and type mismatches. It provides safe coding patterns, security checks for dangerous functions, and performance tips for array operations. The quick reference card and error/fix examples help developers write reliable expressions.

name: n8n-integration-testing-patterns
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: API contract testing, authentication flows, rate limit handling, and error scenario coverage for n8n integrations with external services. Use when testing n8n node integrations.
description_zh: 针对n8n集成的全面测试技能，提供优秀的实践指导、清晰的测试模式和可操作的代码示例，涵盖API契约测试、认证流程和错误处理。
_original_description: A comprehensive testing skill for n8n integrations with excellent practical guidance, clear patterns, and actionable code examples for API contract testing, authentication flows, and error handling.

name: n8n-security-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Credential exposure detection, OAuth flow validation, API key management testing, and data sanitization verification for n8n workflows. Use when validating n8n workflow security.
description_zh: 针对n8n工作流的全面安全测试工具，有效解决凭证暴露、加密验证和身份验证测试，提供实用的代码示例。
_original_description: A comprehensive security testing tool for n8n workflows that effectively addresses credential exposure, encryption verification, and authentication testing with practical code examples.

name: n8n-trigger-testing-strategies
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Webhook testing, schedule validation, event-driven triggers, and polling mechanism testing for n8n workflows. Use when testing how workflows are triggered.
description_zh: 提供n8n工作流触发器的具体测试策略，包括Webhook负载验证、HTTP方法测试、身份验证检查和Cron计划验证。包含常见测试场景的TypeScript代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete testing strategies for n8n workflow triggers including webhook payload validation, HTTP method testing, authentication checks, and cron schedule verification. Includes TypeScript code examples for common testing scenarios.

name: n8n-workflow-testing-fundamentals
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Comprehensive n8n workflow testing including execution lifecycle, node connection patterns, data flow validation, and error handling strategies. Use when testing n8n workflow automation applications.
description_zh: 提供n8n工作流的结构化测试方法，包括验证、执行测试和错误处理。包含常见测试场景的代码示例和多代理测试的协调模式。
_original_description: Provides structured testing methods for n8n workflows, including validation, execution testing, and error handling. Offers code examples for common testing scenarios and coordination patterns for multi-agent testing.

name: performance-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Test application performance, scalability, and resilience. Use when planning load testing, stress testing, or optimizing system performance.
description_zh: 一份全面且高度实用的性能测试指南，结构优秀，示例清晰，为现代开发团队提供了可操作的工作流程。
_original_description: A comprehensive and highly practical performance testing guide with excellent structure, clear examples, and actionable workflows for modern development teams.

name: quality-metrics
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Measure quality effectively with actionable metrics. Use when establishing quality dashboards, defining KPIs, or evaluating test effectiveness.
description_zh: 一个全面且可操作的质量度量框架，有效区分有效指标与虚荣指标，具有出色的DORA集成和实用的实施指导。
_original_description: A comprehensive and actionable quality metrics framework that effectively distinguishes meaningful metrics from vanity metrics, with excellent DORA integration and practical implementation guidance.

name: refactoring-patterns
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply safe refactoring patterns to improve code structure without changing behavior. Use when cleaning up code, reducing technical debt, or improving maintainability.
description_zh: 提供具体的代码重构模式和安全规则，用于改善代码结构。包含提取方法、管道替换循环等实例，以及需要避免的反模式。强调测试先行和小步增量修改的原则。
_original_description: Provides concrete refactoring patterns and safety rules for improving code structure. Includes specific examples like Extract Method and Replace Loop with Pipeline, plus anti-patterns to avoid. Emphasizes test-first approach and small, incremental changes.

name: regression-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Strategic regression testing with test selection, impact analysis, and continuous regression management. Use when verifying fixes don't break existing functionality, planning regression suites, or optimizing test execution for faster feedback.
description_zh: 该技能提供基于代码变更和风险的智能测试选择回归测试策略。包含针对不同场景（每次提交、每日、发布前）的具体方法，并提供了CI/CD集成和测试优化的实际示例。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured approach to regression testing with intelligent test selection based on code changes and risk. It offers concrete strategies for different scenarios (per-commit, nightly, pre-release) and includes practical examples for CI/CD integration and test optimization.

name: risk-based-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Focus testing effort on highest-risk areas using risk assessment and prioritization. Use when planning test strategy, allocating testing resources, or making coverage decisions.
description_zh: 一个结构良好、实用性强的技能，用于实施基于风险的测试方法，具有清晰的工作流程、评分系统和用于动态风险评估的智能体集成。
_original_description: A well-structured, practical skill for implementing risk-based testing methodology with clear workflows, scoring systems, and agent integration for dynamic risk assessment.

name: security-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Test for security vulnerabilities using OWASP principles. Use when conducting security audits, testing auth, or implementing security practices.
description_zh: 基于OWASP Top 10提供结构化的安全测试方法，包含访问控制、注入攻击和加密漏洞的测试代码示例。集成了CI/CD流程，支持多个安全代理的协同工作。
_original_description: Provides a structured approach to security testing based on OWASP Top 10, with ready-to-use test code for access control, injection, and crypto failures. Includes CI/CD integration examples and coordination for multiple security-focused agents.

name: sherlock-review
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Evidence-based investigative code review using deductive reasoning to determine what actually happened versus what was claimed. Use when verifying implementation claims, investigating bugs, validating fixes, or conducting root cause analysis. Elementary approach to finding truth through systematic observation.
description_zh: 通过系统性的证据收集和演绎推理来验证代码声明的结构化方法。包含调查模板、检查清单和示例场景，用于验证错误修复、性能改进和边界情况处理。
_original_description: Provides a structured methodology for verifying code claims through systematic evidence collection and deductive reasoning. Includes investigation templates, checklists, and example scenarios for validating bug fixes, performance improvements, and edge case handling.

name: shift-left-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Move testing activities earlier in the development lifecycle to catch defects when they're cheapest to fix. Use when implementing TDD, CI/CD, or early quality practices.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的左移测试实施指南，包含明确的实施层级、实用示例和现代开发团队的智能体协调策略。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide to implementing shift-left testing practices with clear implementation levels, practical examples, and agent coordination strategies for modern development teams.

name: shift-right-testing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Testing in production with feature flags, canary deployments, synthetic monitoring, and chaos engineering. Use when implementing production observability or progressive delivery.
description_zh: 该技能提供了在生产环境中进行测试的具体模式，包括功能开关、金丝雀部署和混沌实验。包含渐进式发布和监控错误率、延迟等关键指标的具体代码示例。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for testing in production environments using feature flags, canary deployments, and chaos experiments. It includes specific code examples for implementing progressive rollouts and monitoring key metrics like error rates and latency.

name: six-thinking-hats
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply Edward de Bono's Six Thinking Hats methodology to software testing for comprehensive quality analysis. Use when designing test strategies, conducting test retrospectives, analyzing test failures, evaluating testing approaches, or facilitating testing discussions. Each hat provides a distinct testing perspective: facts (White), risks (Black), benefits (Yellow), creativity (Green), emotions (Red), and process (Blue).
description_zh: 将六顶思考帽方法论应用于软件测试场景，提供结构化模板来分析测试策略、识别风险并生成创新测试方法。包含计时会话格式和与测试代理的集成示例。
_original_description: Applies Edward de Bono's Six Thinking Hats framework specifically to software testing contexts. Provides structured templates for analyzing test strategies, identifying risks, and generating creative testing approaches. Includes timed session formats and integration examples with testing agents.

name: skill-builder
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Create new Claude Code Skills with proper YAML frontmatter, progressive disclosure structure, and complete directory organization. Use when you need to build custom skills for specific workflows, generate skill templates, or understand the Claude Skills specification.
description_zh: 一个全面的元技能，专业指导用户创建符合规范的Claude技能，包含正确结构、渐进式披露架构和最佳实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive meta-skill that expertly guides users through creating Claude Skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure architecture, and best practices for optimal performance.

name: tdd-london-chicago
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Apply London (mock-based) and Chicago (state-based) TDD schools. Use when practicing test-driven development or choosing testing style for your context.
description_zh: 该技能通过清晰的决策规则指导开发者使用伦敦（基于模拟）和芝加哥（基于状态）TDD方法。提供具体示例、常见陷阱以及用于测试生成和重构的代理协调模式。快速参考卡帮助团队根据代码类型选择合适的测试风格。
_original_description: This skill guides developers through London (mock-based) and Chicago (state-based) TDD approaches with clear decision rules. It provides concrete examples, common pitfalls, and agent coordination patterns for test generation and refactoring. The quick reference card helps teams choose the right testing style based on code type.

name: technical-writing
author: proffesor-for-testing
description: Write clear, engaging technical content from real experience. Use when writing blog posts, documentation, tutorials, or technical articles.
description_zh: 为技术写作者提供具体的模板和编辑规则。包含明确的前后对比示例、针对不同受众的写作指南，并能与质量分析智能体集成。核心是删除冗余内容，用数据和实例展示成果。
_original_description: Provides concrete templates and editing rules for technical writers. Includes specific before/after examples, audience-specific guidance, and integration with quality analysis agents. Focuses on cutting fluff and showing results with data.
